title: Dining
content:
There was a young lady of Cork,
     Whose Pa made a fortune in pork;
        He bought for his daughter
        A tutor who taught her
     To balance green peas on her fork.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Dining"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
